subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-31 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the Kingdom of God, women and men are one and the same. It is incumbent on everyone to summon humanity to turn towards the Most Exalted Horizon and to spread the sweet savours of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ملکوت الهی زن و مرد یکسانند جمیع باید ندا بافق اعلی نمایند و نشر نفحات اللّٰه کنند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @equality of men and women, @unity; oneness of humanity
